data.body:
SCOPE AMENDMENT (brainstorm 2026-04-20)

This epic adds a new success criterion: per-ticket token attribution.

NEW SC: PER-TICKET TOKEN ATTRIBUTION

Rationale:
- Current observability infrastructure (check_usage.py at 307-310) returns only USAGE_SOURCE / USAGE_5HR / USAGE_7DAY / VERDICT. No per-ticket token counts exist.
- Current hook (post-all.sh at 50-59) measures wall-clock ms only; no token extraction.
- Jira Number fields support Numeric(18,6) ~= 10^12 maximum, sufficient for multi-billion-token work estimates.

Scope:
- PLANNING skills (brainstorm, preplanning, implementation-plan) ESTIMATE token consumption during their own execution and record the estimate on the parent ticket.
- EXECUTION skills (sprint, fix-bug) MEASURE actual token consumption during their execution and record the measurement on the ticket(s) being worked.
- Planning tokens and execution tokens are recorded as SEPARATE fields on the ticket so users can compare estimate-vs-actual and planning-overhead-vs-execution-work.

Data model:
- Extend the reducer schema with two optional fields: tokens_estimated and tokens_measured (both Numeric, default 0).
- Extend Jira bridge to sync these as Jira Number custom fields (bridge_remediation epic 83e2-04ae overlaps — coordinate).
- EDIT events can update either field; final value is the max observed during the most recent execution pass.

Instrumentation:
- post-all.sh hook extended to extract per-turn token counts from the Claude Code hook payload (if available) and write them to the active ticket via ticket-edit.sh.
- check_usage.py extended to expose per-session token delta (not just bucket percentages), and planning skills call this at start/end of their execution to compute estimate.

Dependencies:
- Depends on Epic 1de7-50d4 (reporter/resolution) — reducer schema extension should follow that epic so field additions compose cleanly.
- Coordinates with Epic 83e2-04ae (bridge sync remediation) — the Jira Number custom field sync for tokens_* should land in that epic, not here.

RERUN REQUIRED: preplanning must be rerun for this epic to decompose the token attribution SC into stories. Complexity: COMPLEX — new reducer fields, new hook extraction logic, cross-skill instrumentation, bridge sync coordination.
